name: fbx2vrma-converter
description: Convert FBX/BVH animation files to VRMA for the 3D Asset Manager conversion pipeline, plus Mixamo library tooling.
comment_puppeteer: download-mixamo.js needs puppeteer, but it is intentionally NOT a dependency: it is a heavy (~Chromium) local/admin-only tool and must stay out of the server Docker image. Install on demand: cd tools && npm install puppeteer
